title: Undefined  $_DFFSR_PPP_ in BLIF file
body:
Hi, 

I am using Yosys to convert a Verilog file into a BLIF one to be read in ABC. In some cases, the outputted file has some undefined model for the $_DFFSR_PPP_ subcircuit. 

I have tried different ways to generate the BLIF file, but I always end up having this undefined subcircuit.

## Steps to reproduce the issue
The Yosys script I am using is as follows: 

```
read_verilog -nolatches ./fpu/fpu_eqn.v

hierarchy -check -top fpu
proc
techmap -map +/adff2dff.v
dffsr2dff

flatten
memory
fsm
techmap


write_blif fpu/fpu.blif
```

and the Verilog file can be downloaded from here: https://drive.google.com/open?id=1ZkZacSpfq5aNOeTOqptoTmQKiFslqIbh

Are there any problems in my flow? I thought the problem could be fixed using the dffsr2dff command. I am not sure if I am doing something wrong or if the dffsr2dff pass is skipping something. 

## Expected behavior

Having a BLIF file with no undefined models for $_DFFSR_PPP_. 

## Actual behavior

ABC cannot parse the file because the undefined  $_DFFSR_PPP_.

Thanks,
